Gerardo Lucero

Solutions Architect & Technical PM

7+ years designing and delivering distributed systems. From Kafka pipelines and Kubernetes clusters to product roadmaps and multi-team leadership — I operate at the intersection of deep engineering and strategic product thinking.

What I do

⬡

Solutions Architecture

Cloud-native design on AWS & GCP — ECS, Lambda, Kubernetes, OpenShift. Scalable, resilient, secure.

AWSGCPKubernetesOpenShift
⬡

Distributed Systems

Event-driven architectures with Kafka and SQS. Hexagonal design, end-to-end observability with Dynatrace & Prometheus.

KafkaSQSDynatraceGrafana
⬡

Technical Product

Roadmap ownership, multi-team coordination, and delivery in fast-paced agile environments across fintech and retail.

RoadmapsAgileDevSecOpsCI/CD
